use_cases: Creative portfolios and design agency websites seeking distinctive cursor effects
Premium product landing pages wanting interactive mouse interactions
Interactive storytelling experiences with custom cursor feedback
Creative tool interfaces needing distinctive pointer styling
Minimalist web experiences requiring sleek custom cursor replacement
ai_summary: A custom cursor component that replaces the native browser cursor with a large, smooth-following circular element using color inversion effects. Built with React hooks and requestAnimationFrame for buttery-smooth lerped animations, supporting visibility toggling on mouse enter/leave and configurable sizing via props. Creates an immersive, premium feel by hiding the default cursor and providing fluid mouse tracking with configurable dimensions.
